subject: A Ninja job-class figure from Final Fantasy XIV — a humanoid figure in dark layered armor crouching in a ready stance, holding blades
description: A humanoid figure crouches in a low, coiled ready stance. The figure is dressed in dark, layered armor with silver and dark elements, and wears a mask or face covering. The hair is dark with a reddish-brown element suggesting a bun or cloth wrap. The figure visibly holds blades — short weapons discernible in the hands. The pose communicates readiness and controlled aggression. The art style is detailed and realistic in the FFXIV aesthetic, with more painterly rendering than the chibi-styled cards. The background is pale grey-green and largely bare, focusing all visual weight on the crouching figure. The scale of the figure in the frame emphasizes their compact, poised silhouette.
foreground: Dark-armored crouching figure holding blades in ready stance
emotion: crouched and coiled — controlled readiness, zero expression visible behind mask
